calibration_notes: My recent BEARISH intraday calls have been highly accurate (9 of 11 correct), particularly when VIX >25 and oil prices surge — maintaining this approach. However, I've been too conservative with confidence levels (40-55%) given my 82% success rate on BEARISH calls; adjusting confidence upward when multiple bearish catalysts align. For NVDA specifically, my last two calls were too aggressive on downside targets when it showed relative strength — now factoring in NVDA's resilience during broad market selloffs.

news_impact: Oil surge headlines dominating with 'disaster pricing' in options markets, overwhelming any positive earnings news. Energy shock narrative triggering inflation fears despite core CPI moderation.
options_flow_impact: Neutral P/C at 0.846 misleading — massive deep ITM put positions on GOOGL/MSFT ($5.4M combined) signal institutional downside hedging that dwarfs surface-level flow metrics.
